# CWE-426: plugin search path is taken from the HTTP request.
lang: go
file: CWE-426-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"plugin"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func LoadTenantPlugin(c *gin.Context) (plugin.Symbol, error) {
	searchRoot := c.Query("plugin_dir")
	_ = os.Setenv("PATH", searchRoot+string(os.PathListSeparator)+os.Getenv("PATH"))
	modPath := filepath.Join(searchRoot, c.Param("name")+".so")
	p, err := plugin.Open(modPath)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return p.Lookup("Init")
}
